    F

    FAILED - Enum constant in enum class model.enums.MissionStatus
     
    findDroneBaseById(String) - Method in class model.MapModel
     
    findMedicalSiteById(String) - Method in class model.MapModel
     
    findMedicalStaffById(String) - Method in class model.MapModel
    Finds a medical staff member by ID.
    findNearestAvailableDrone(List, CollectionCenter) - Method in class service.OptimizationService
    Deprecated.
    Use OptimizationService.createMission(DeliveryRequest, List) instead.
    findOptimalBase(CollectionCenter, Hospital) - Method in class service.OptimizationService
    Finds the drone base that minimises: dist(base → collection center) + dist(base → hospital) This is the base that sits closest to BOTH endpoints simultaneously, ensuring the shortest total flight.
    findUserPointById(String) - Method in class model.MapModel
